N

NeoForgeAudience - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge
Minimal audience wrapper for NeoForge; routes messages to logger.
NeoForgeAudience(Logger, UUID) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge.NeoForgeAudience
Wrap an SLF4J logger as a NeoForge audience.
NeoForgeCommandAudience - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge
Audience wrapper for NeoForge command sources.
NeoForgeCommandAudience(CommandSourceStack, boolean) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge.NeoForgeCommandAudience
Creates a command audience using feedback mode.
NeoForgeCommandAudience(CommandSourceStack, boolean, NeoForgeCommandAudience.Mode) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge.NeoForgeCommandAudience
Creates a command audience with a custom mode.
NeoForgeCommandAudience.Mode - Enum Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge
Message dispatch mode.
NeoForgeComponentSerializer - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge
Utility for converting Adventure components to NeoForge chat components.
NeoForgePlatformLogger - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge
SLF4J-backed platform logger for NeoForge runtime.
NeoForgePlatformLogger(Logger) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge.NeoForgePlatformLogger
Bridge between PlatformLogger and SLF4J.
NeoForgePlatformProvider - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge
Platform provider for NeoForge runtime.
NeoForgePlatformProvider() - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge.NeoForgePlatformProvider
Create a NeoForge platform adapter using the current server lifecycle hooks.
NeoForgePlatformProvider(String) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge.NeoForgePlatformProvider
Create a NeoForge platform adapter with a default namespace.
NeoForgePlatformProvider(String, Supplier<MinecraftServer>, Logger, Path) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge.NeoForgePlatformProvider
Create a NeoForge platform adapter with custom settings.
NeoForgePlatformProvider(String, MinecraftServer) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge.NeoForgePlatformProvider
Create a NeoForge platform adapter with an explicit server instance and mod id.
NeoForgePlatformProvider(Supplier<MinecraftServer>) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge.NeoForgePlatformProvider
Create a NeoForge platform adapter with a custom server supplier.
NeoForgePlatformProvider(MinecraftServer) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge.NeoForgePlatformProvider
Create a NeoForge platform adapter with an explicit server instance.
NeoForgePlayerAudience - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge
Audience wrapper for NeoForge server players.
NeoForgePlayerAudience(ServerPlayer) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge.NeoForgePlayerAudience
Creates an audience for the given player.
